headline: Uber Inks Deal to Acquire Blacklane: Is it a Growth Catalyst?
summary: UBER's planned Blacklane buy aims to scale chauffeur-driven Uber Elite and boost premium travel reach -- pending approvals, closing by end-2026.

headline: 2 Reasons to Like UBER (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for Uber. The stock has dropped 28.3% and now trades at $71.74, rattling many shareholders. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Rivian Automotive (RIVN) Is Up 6.3% After Reaffirming 2026 Deliveries And Securing VW Software Deal
summary: In early April 2026, Rivian Automotive reported first-quarter production of 10,236 vehicles and deliveries of 10,365 vehicles from its Normal, Illinois plant, while reaffirming its 2026 delivery guidance of 62,000 to 67,000 vehicles. At the same time, Rivian secured large-scale technology and autonomy collaborations with Volkswagen and Uber, signaling a push to build recurring, higher-margin software and services revenue alongside its core vehicle business. Next, we’ll examine how Rivian’s...
